title: More Hanging Roots
description: Adds more variants for hanging roots.
body:
# Fixed Barrel **Hi!** This pack includes more variants of the new hanging roots. Some of them are based on the first snapshot texture and some are mix of old and new style. Each one will appear in three color variations!
**Hope you like it!**
